content.text:
Looking at the molecule visualization, I can clearly identify atom C:35 (carbon with index 35) in the structure. From the image, I can see the covalent bonds connected to atom 35:

- Atom C:34 (carbon, index 34) - connected to the upper left of C:35
- Atom C:36 (carbon, index 36) - connected to the lower left of C:35  
- Atom C:4 (carbon, index 4) - connected to the right of C:35

Let me verify these connections by examining the bonding pattern around C:35. The carbon atom at position 35 appears to be part of an aromatic ring system, and I can clearly see three covalent bonds extending from it to atoms 34, 36, and 4.

The geomconf_index for this molecule can be determined from the filename "geomconf_6953.xyz", which indicates the geomconf_index is 6953.

Therefore, the neighbor atoms of atom 35 (C) are:
- Atomic index 34, element C
- Atomic index 36, element C  
- Atomic index 4, element C

Geomconf_index: 6953

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 35, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
